hero.headline: Tampa's Fastest-Growing Pool Service
hero.subheadline: Precision Pools delivers CPO-certified weekly maintenance trusted by homeowners and major hotel brands alike. From South Tampa backyards to IHG and Marriott properties, Griffin and his team keep every pool crystal clear.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block">Tampa Homes & Businesses
services.subtitle: From weekly chemical balancing to full cleaning and commercial maintenance, Precision Pools handles every detail so you never have to think about your pool again.

cards.title: Full Cleaning Service
cards.description: Our complete weekly package: chemical testing and balancing, wall and tile brushing, skimmer and basket cleaning, filter maintenance, surface netting, and vacuuming. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Chemicals Only
cards.description: Perfect for hands-on pool owners who handle the physical cleaning. We test, balance, and add all chemicals weekly to keep your water safe, clear, and properly maintained.

cards.title: No Vacuum Service
cards.description: Everything in our full cleaning package minus the vacuuming — ideal if you have an automatic vacuum. Chemical balancing, brushing, equipment monitoring, and skimmer cleaning at a reduced rate.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Professional-grade maintenance for hotels, resorts, and property managers. Trusted by IHG Hotels, Marriott TownePlace Suites, and KW Property Management to keep their pools guest-ready.

cards.title: After-Storm Cleanup
cards.description: Tampa storms can wreck a pool overnight. Our emergency cleanup crew removes debris, rebalances chemicals, and restores your pool to safe, swimmable condition fast.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Cartridge cleaning, DE backwashing, or sand filter maintenance to keep your filtration system running at peak performance and your water sparkling clean.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Crystal Clear Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll provide a straightforward quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no hidden fees — just honest pricing from a CPO-certified team.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our background-checked technicians arrive on your scheduled day to clean, test, balance, and inspect your pool. Owner Griffin personally ensures every pool meets Precision standards.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Year-Round
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every week. Tampa's year-round pool season means you always have a sparkling backyard oasis waiting for you.

about.label: Why Tampa Trusts Precision Pools
about.headline: Built on Precision. Backed by Results.
about.description: Precision Pools was founded in 2022 by Lynn University graduate Griffin Shahmanesh, who saw an opportunity to raise the bar for pool service in Tampa. In just four years, Precision Pools has become Tampa's fastest-growing pool company — earning trust from homeowners across South Tampa and major commercial clients including IHG Hotels, Marriott TownePlace Suites, and KW Property Management. Every technician is CPO-certified and background-checked, because your pool and your peace of mind deserve nothing less.

features.title: CPO-Certified Owner & Team
features.description: Griffin holds his Certified Pool Operator credential and ensures every technician meets the same professional standard before touching your pool.

features.title: Trusted by Major Hotel Brands
features.description: IHG Hotels, Marriott, and KW Property Management trust Precision Pools with their commercial properties — that same precision goes into every residential pool we service.

features.title: Tampa's Fastest-Growing Pool Co.
features.description: A 96% five-star rating and rapid growth since 2022 prove that word-of-mouth from satisfied Tampa pool owners is the best advertising there is.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service tier that fits your pool and your budget. No long-term contracts — we earn your business every single visit.

guarantee.headline: Our Precision Promise Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't crystal clear after any service visit, call Griffin directly and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. Precision Pools was built on the belief that every Tampa pool owner deserves reliable, detail-obsessed care — and we stand behind that belief with every visit. It's why hotels trust us, and it's why your neighbors keep referring us.

faqs.question: How quickly can Precision Pools start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are added to our schedule within 3-5 business days. If your pool needs urgent attention after a storm or has turned green, call us at (813) 338-3998 and we'll prioritize getting you taken care of.

faqs.question: What does CPO-certified mean?
faqs.answer: CPO stands for Certified Pool Operator — it's the industry's gold-standard credential for water chemistry, equipment operation, and pool safety. Owner Griffin Shahmanesh holds this certification, ensuring your pool is serviced by someone who truly understands pool science, not just surface cleaning.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Tampa clients provide gate or screen enclosure access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll always know what was done and how your water chemistry looks after each visit.

faqs.question: What's the difference between your Full Cleaning and No Vacuum plans?
faqs.answer: Both plans include chemical testing, wall brushing, skimmer cleaning, and equipment monitoring. The Full Cleaning plan adds vacuuming the pool floor and steps. If you have a robotic vacuum, the No Vacuum plan saves you money while still covering all other maintenance tasks.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Precision Pools maintains pools for IHG Hotels, Marriott TownePlace Suites, and KW Property Management. We understand the higher compliance standards and guest-facing demands of commercial properties, and we deliver that same level of precision to every client.

testimonials.name: Gilberto G.
testimonials.text: Highly recommend Griffin and his team for any of your pool service needs. Extremely professional and top notch customer service.

testimonials.name: WJS
testimonials.text: Griffin is reliable, polite and efficient. He is very accommodating and pays attention to detail.

testimonials.name: Thomas W.
testimonials.text: If you have to keep up with the Joneses and have your property in that high echelon, Griffin is worth calling.
